description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing GTK+3.0 and gtksourceview-3.0 with `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq gtk+3.0 gtksourceview-3.0`. Define a single job named saedit that executes `make all` in the default stage on any branch, using the default Docker image. No additional stages, caches, artifacts, or rules are specified.
